meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Combat Fitness Test
meta.description:
The CFT is designed to ensure that Marines are able to meet the physical demands their jobs will require during combat. Not only do recruits need to pass the final CFT during boot camp in order to graduate, but will continue to take the CFT once a year for the rest of their Marine Corps career. 

View the 2021 CFT standards here:
👉  http://sbxx.us/3sUEX3T

(U.S. Marine Corps video by Lance Cpl. Godfrey Ampong/Released)
*DoD endorsement not implied
